race.comment: Handy little race. SIMPLY OUTRAGEOUS (7) is in flying form of late, just missing at Geelong two back before relishing a drop in grade to bolt in at Echuca by 4.5 lengths as the $1.40 favourite. Expect Olivia East to be positive again and take plenty of catching. IL PATRIGNO (5) is coming off an easy maiden win at Seymour when coming away to score by three lengths. He can track the pace here and measure up. SOLDIER BOI (9) also won his maiden by three lengths when last seen, resuming with an easy victory at Geelong. He'll be back but charging home late. MADESIAN (11) was much better second up at Sale and can give a sight.
